special_mechanics.name: Trap System
special_mechanics.description: Kevin can set traps using items scattered around the house to incapacitate enemies (Harry and Marv). Each trap has different strength and knockout duration.

special_mechanics.name: Hide Mechanic
special_mechanics.description: Kevin can hide behind certain parts of the house, but only for two consecutive turns. Further concurrent passings result in game over.

special_mechanics.name: Item Collection and Chute System
special_mechanics.description: Goal is to evade enemies while bringing McCallister fortunes from the house down to safe room via chute in basement.

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. No precise physics parameters documented in available sources. Game emphasizes gameplay mechanics (trap-setting, evasion, hiding) over movement physics. Developer: Imagineering (SNES version). Programmers: Alex DeMeo, Garry Kitchen, David Lubar.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Home Alone (SNES)
